# strat test

**PLACEHOLDER**: this page will be auto-generated by `make docs-cli` once the
`mdclick` pipeline lands. Until then, run `almanak strat test --help` for the
live flags.

`almanak strat test` is the deterministic E2E action test harness. It drives a
strategy through one or more named `force_actions` against a fresh Anvil fork
and reports a structured JSON summary with per-step status.

See [`docs/api/strategies.md`](../api/strategies.md#authoring-rules) for the
authoring contract.
